name: ASRock Z790 PG Lightning ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x1 - M.2 Key-E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6800+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - eDP 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN
shortName: ASRock Z790 PG Lightning ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ASRock Z790 PG Lightning ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 socket with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and multiple M.2 slots.
